mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM drug_info WHERE 1=1
AND drug_name like concat('%',#{drug_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
AND mnemonic_code like concat('%',#{mnemonic_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
LIMIT 0,50

SELECT * FROM drug_info WHERE 1=1
AND drug_name like concat('%',#{drug_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
AND drug_code like concat('%',#{drug_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
AND mnemonic_code like concat('%',#{mnemonic_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
LIMIT ${(nowPageNumber-1) * pageSize} ,#{pageSize}

SELECT count(*) FROM drug_info WHERE 1=1
AND drug_name like concat('%',#{drug_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
AND drug_code like concat('%',#{drug_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
AND mnemonic_code like concat('%',#{mnemonic_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_info (drug_code, drug_name, drug_format, drug_unit, manufacturer, drug_dosage, drug_type, drug_price, mnemonic_code, creation_date) VALUES (#{drug_code}, #{drug_name}, #{drug_format}, #{drug_unit}, #{manufacturer}, #{drug_dosage}, #{drug_type}, #{drug_price}, #{mnemonic_code}, NOW())
